summary: Frontend-only testing for HoneyGroove feed filter and tracklist viewer features. All 6 features tested and verified working.

issues: Some 503 errors in console for resource loading (images/avatars), but doesn't affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: HoneyGroove feed features working correctly. All 6 feed filters present (All, Now Spinning, ISO, Haul, Notes, For Sale/Trade). Tracklist viewer fetches from Discogs API and displays tracks. Mobile filter centering uses justify-center. The For Sale/Trade filter is working but currently shows empty state since there are no listing posts in the feed.

feed_filters_6_present.details: Found all 6 filters: filter-all, filter-NOW_SPINNING, filter-ISO, filter-NEW_HAUL, filter-NOTE, filter-listing

for_sale_trade_merged_filter.details: Filter present with label '🏷️ For Sale/Trade'. Filter active and working but no listing_sale/listing_trade posts in feed currently

mobile_filter_centering.details: Filter bar has display=flex, flexWrap=wrap, justifyContent=center. Filters properly centered on 390px mobile viewport

tracklist_viewer_button.details: Found 6 'View Tracklist' buttons on Now Spinning posts with data-testid='tracklist-toggle'

tracklist_api_fetch.details: Clicking View Tracklist fetches from /api/discogs/release/{discogs_id} and displays tracks. Tested with Taylor Swift 'Lover' album - 18 tracks displayed

tracklist_shows_positions_titles_duratio.details: Tracks display position (A1, A2, etc.), title (I Forgot That You Existed, Cruel Summer, Lover, etc.), and duration

now_spinning_includes_randomizer.details: Now Spinning filter correctly shows posts. Code review confirms filter logic includes both NOW_SPINNING and RANDOMIZER post types at line 598
